Weekend Trips

Fancy a short getaway over a weekend?

Explore now

See the after school weekend trips below

Included in all Trips:
  • Accommodation (shared room)
  • Return flights from London Gatwick
  • Breakfast
  • Support

Every trip £285pp

Disclaimer: Confirmation of your trip will be sent one month before departure. Terms and conditions apply.

Ireland, Scotland and Wales
